new-employee-onboarding: SmartHR is API-only (no MCP) — employee data contains PII (My Number, address); never log or forward raw payloads to Chatwork messages.
KING OF TIME shift_pattern IDs are opaque integers that vary per tenant; hard-code a lookup or fetch via /shift_patterns before assigning.
Chatwork rate limit is 300 req/5 min and messages are plain text only — no Markdown or rich formatting. Use [info][title]...[/title]...[/info] tags for visual structure.
SmartHR webhook payloads differ between create and update events; always check the event type before mapping fields to KING OF TIME registration.
talent-review-workflow: SmartHR is API-only; employee list endpoint paginates via cursor — follow the 'next' link in response headers or you will silently miss employees.
Kaonavi API rate limit is strict at 30 req/min. For bulk evaluation updates, use the batch export endpoint and throttle writes.
Employee IDs between SmartHR and Kaonavi are not guaranteed to match. Establish a shared key (e.g., email) in your field mapping before syncing.
Kaonavi evaluation data may contain private performance scores — redact or summarize before posting to Chatwork to avoid PII leaks.
attendance-payroll-sync: KING OF TIME is API-only; clock-in/out times may include open records (employees who forgot to clock out). Validate all records are closed before exporting.
freee OAuth token expires every 24 hours — implement automatic token refresh or the monthly payroll import will fail silently.
Overtime rate calculation must follow Japanese labor law: 25% premium for standard overtime, 50% for late-night (22:00–05:00), 35% for holiday work. Mismatch causes payroll errors.
freee HR requires company_id on every API call. If your org has multiple freee companies, ensure the correct one is selected for the target payroll.
year-end-adjustment: SmartHR is API-only; year-end adjustment document types (扶養控除申告書, 保険料控除申告書) use specific API endpoints — the generic employee endpoint won't return them.
freee HR fiscal year setting determines which tax year endpoints return data. Verify fiscal_year parameter matches the target 年末調整 year.
Housing loan deduction (住宅ローン控除) requires special handling: first-year submissions go to the tax office directly, not through year-end adjustment.
Chatwork rate limit is 300 req/5 min — if processing hundreds of employees, batch the completion report into a single message rather than per-employee notifications.
smarthr-kintone-onboarding-sync: SmartHR is API-only and webhook payloads differ between create/update — filter by employment status '入社予定' to avoid processing existing employee updates.
kintone field codes are workspace-specific; the onboarding app field codes in staging will differ from production. Externalize field code mapping in config.
kintone lookup fields cannot be set directly via API — if your checklist template uses lookups, set the source field value instead and let kintone resolve the lookup.
Slack channel names max 80 characters, must be lowercase with no spaces or Japanese characters. Sanitize employee name to romaji before creating the channel.
smarthr-freee-hr-employee-sync: SmartHR is API-only with cursor-based pagination — always follow the 'next' link in response headers or you will miss employees beyond the first page.
freee OAuth token expires every 24 hours. Schedule syncs to refresh the token first, or the upsert step will return 401.
Employee number formats differ between SmartHR and freee HR. Use email as a secondary match key to avoid creating duplicates when IDs don't align.
SmartHR employee data is PII-heavy — the Chatwork sync report should only include counts and error summaries, never names or personal details.
jobcan-slack-attendance-alert: Jobcan is API-only with Basic Auth using an API key. Rate limit is 100 req/min — if polling multiple departments, stagger requests to avoid 429 errors.
Jobcan department IDs are numeric and do not match Slack channel IDs. Maintain a department-to-channel mapping in config and keep it updated when org changes occur.
Attendance anomaly definitions (late, missing clock-out, overtime threshold) must be configured in your logic — Jobcan API returns raw records, not pre-classified anomalies.
Slack bot must be invited to each target channel before posting. Use conversations.join or manually invite the bot to all manager channels during setup.
kingoftime-freee-overtime-journal: KING OF TIME is API-only; overtime classification distinguishes 法定内 (statutory within) and 法定外 (statutory excess) with different multiplier rates (1.25x vs 1.35x for 60+ hours/month).
freee OAuth token expires every 24 hours and company_id is required on every call. Refresh the token and validate company_id before posting journal entries.
Always reverse the previous month's overtime accrual entry before posting the new one to avoid double-counting in freee's ledger.
KING OF TIME returns overtime hours in decimal format (2.5 = 2h30m). Convert to yen amounts using configured hourly rates before creating the freee journal entry.
officestation-smarthr-insurance-sync: SmartHR webhooks may fire before all related fields are updated. Add a short delay (5+ seconds) before fetching employee details to ensure data consistency.
OfficeStation form fields must match e-Gov format exactly — My Number (マイナンバー) handling requires encryption in transit and must never appear in Chatwork notifications.
SmartHR webhook payloads differ between create and update events. Map change_type to the correct OfficeStation form type (取得届 for hire, 喪失届 for termination, 変更届 for changes).
Chatwork rate limit is 300 req/5 min and only supports plain text. Never include employee PII (My Number, insurance numbers) in notification messages.
talentio-slack-interview-schedule: Talentio API is invite-only — you must contact Talentio support to enable API access before this recipe can work. There is no self-service API key generation.
Slack users.lookupByEmail may fail if interviewers use different email addresses in Slack vs Talentio. Maintain an explicit email mapping table.
Google Calendar API requires the calendar write scope and service account domain-wide delegation must be configured for the calendar to create events on behalf of users.
Candidate names and interview details are sensitive recruiting data. Avoid posting candidate full names in public Slack channels — use DMs to interviewers only.
kaonavi-smarthr-talent-sync: Kaonavi API rate limit is strict at 30 req/min. Use the bulk export endpoint for large evaluation datasets instead of per-employee calls.
SmartHR custom field groups must be pre-created in the SmartHR admin console. The API will return 422 if the target field group ID does not exist.
Employee ID formats differ between Kaonavi and SmartHR. Establish a shared unique key (email or employee number) in your mapping configuration.
Evaluation data contains sensitive performance information classified as PII under Japanese privacy law. Ensure API calls use HTTPS and never cache scores in plain text.
freee-hr-jobcan-leave-sync: freee HR leave balance API returns balances as of the query date but does not reflect pending/unapproved leave requests. Warn users about potential discrepancies.
Jobcan leave types (有休, 特別休暇, 代休, etc.) must be manually mapped to freee HR leave categories. Mismatched types will silently fail or overwrite wrong balances.
freee OAuth token expires every 24 hours. If this sync runs on a daily schedule, implement token refresh at the start of each run.
Jobcan is API-only with a rate limit of 100 req/min. For organizations with 100+ employees, batch the balance updates to stay under the limit.
smarthr-garoon-employee-directory: SmartHR is API-only; the employee list may include inactive/terminated employees. Filter by employment_status = 'employed' before syncing to Garoon.
Garoon address book API requires cybozu.com admin privileges. For on-premises Garoon versions, the XML-based API must be used instead of the REST API.
SmartHR employee data is PII-heavy (phone, address, email). Only sync fields that belong in a corporate directory — omit salary, My Number, and personal details.
Garoon does not support upsert natively. Query existing entries by employee ID first, then decide whether to create or update to avoid duplicate directory entries.
freee-smarthr-payroll-sync: SmartHR is API-only and the payroll endpoint requires the 'payroll' OAuth scope. Verify the OAuth token has this scope or the export will return 403.
freee OAuth token expires every 24 hours and requires company_id on every call. Refresh token and confirm company_id before creating journal entries.
SmartHR deduction categories (法定福利費, 給与手当) must be mapped to freee account codes. If target accounts don't exist in freee's chart of accounts, journal creation will fail.
Payroll data is highly sensitive PII. The Slack notification should only include employee count and totals — never individual salary amounts or names.
smarthr-slack-onboarding-checklist: SmartHR is API-only; the webhook fires on employee status change to 在籍. Check employment_type to differentiate part-time vs full-time checklist templates.
Slack channel names max 80 characters, must be lowercase with no spaces. Japanese characters in employee names must be converted to romaji or initials.
Slack conversations.invite requires the bot to already be a member of the channel. Call conversations.join first, then invite HR team, manager, and buddy.
SmartHR webhook payloads differ between create and update events. Deduplicate to avoid creating multiple onboarding channels for the same employee.
kingoftime-smarthr-overtime-report: KING OF TIME is API-only; overtime hours come in decimal format (e.g., 2.5 = 2h30m). Convert to the format SmartHR custom fields expect before updating.
SmartHR custom field for overtime must be number type. If the field group ID or field code is wrong, the API returns a generic 422 with no helpful message.
36 Agreement (三六協定) limits are 45h/month and 360h/year by default. Your alert threshold should trigger before hitting the legal limit (e.g., at 40h/month, 320h/year).
Both KING OF TIME and SmartHR are API-only with no MCP. Build retry logic for both APIs as neither provides webhook delivery guarantees.
smarthr-line-works-hr-announce: SmartHR is API-only; the announcements API may require SmartHR Plus (add-on) and custom webhook setup. Verify your plan includes this feature.
LINE WORKS Bot API v2 has rate limits per bot — distribute messages to department groups sequentially with a delay between each to avoid throttling.
SmartHR department IDs must be mapped to LINE WORKS group IDs in configuration. Keep this mapping updated when organization restructures occur.
LINE WORKS message API has a 5000 character limit per message. Truncate long HR announcements and include a link to the full text in SmartHR.
kintone-kingoftime-attendance: KING OF TIME is API-only; check for open records (employees who forgot to clock out) before importing — incomplete records will cause data integrity issues in kintone.
kintone field codes are workspace-specific and change between environments. Externalize the attendance app field code mapping in config, not in code.
kintone does not support native upsert. Query by employee_id + date composite key first, then add or update to avoid duplicate attendance rows.
Chatwork rate limit is 300 req/5 min. Send anomaly alerts only when issues exist, and batch all anomalies into a single message rather than per-employee notifications.
invoice-processing: freee OAuth token expires every 24 hours. If invoice creation and MoneyForward journaling span separate scheduled runs, both tokens must be refreshed independently.
freee amounts are in JPY (integers, no decimals). MoneyForward journal entry format differs from freee — map the debit/credit structure before posting.
freee requires company_id on every API call. If you manage multiple companies, ensure the invoice is created under the correct company context.
Japanese consumption tax has two rates (10% standard, 8% reduced for food/beverages). Ensure line items use the correct tax_rate or the 適格請求書 will be non-compliant.
stripe-freee-payment-sync: Stripe JP amounts for JPY are already in whole yen (amount=1000 means ¥1000, NOT ¥10). Do not divide by 100 — this is the most common integration bug.
freee OAuth token expires every 24 hours and company_id is required on every call. Implement auto-refresh and validate company_id before posting journals.
Record Stripe processing fee (typically 3.6% for domestic cards) as 支払手数料 in a separate expense line. Net amount = payment amount minus fee.
Stripe test keys (sk_test_*) and live keys (sk_live_*) hit different environments. Verify you are using live keys in production to avoid missing real payments.
freee-cloudsign-invoice-esign: CloudSign document status transitions are strict: draft → sent → agreed. You cannot skip steps or move backwards. Send only after confirming the draft is complete.
freee OAuth token expires every 24 hours. If invoice creation and CloudSign envelope happen in separate sessions, refresh the freee token before updating invoice status.
CloudSign free plan limits to 5 documents per month. Check remaining quota via API before creating the envelope to avoid a hard failure.
Ensure freee invoice uses 適格請求書 (qualified invoice) format for Invoice System compliance. Missing registration number will make the e-signed document non-compliant.
square-freee-pos-accounting: Square amounts are in JPY (integers). freee also expects JPY integers — no currency conversion needed, but verify both sides agree on tax-inclusive vs tax-exclusive totals.
freee OAuth token expires every 24 hours and company_id is required. Refresh before the daily journal post or the entire day's sales will fail to record.
Split journal entries by payment method: cash → 現金 (debit), card/QR → 売掛金 (debit), total → 売上高 (credit). Missing this split makes bank reconciliation impossible.
Chatwork rate limit is 300 req/5 min and supports plain text only. Use [info] tags for the daily summary, and format ¥ amounts with comma separators for readability.
square-moneyforward-daily-sales: Square API uses UTC timestamps. Convert to JST (UTC+9) for date boundaries or you will split a single business day's sales across two journal entries.
MoneyForward OAuth behaves similarly to freee but journal entry format differs. Ensure debit/credit structure matches MoneyForward's expected schema, not freee's.
Square processing fees must be recorded separately as 支払手数料. MoneyForward requires balanced debit/credit entries — omitting fees will cause an imbalanced journal error.
Square amounts are in JPY (integers). MoneyForward also expects integers — do not introduce decimal amounts or the journal entry will be rejected.
stripe-freee-recurring-sync: Stripe JP amounts for JPY have NO decimal conversion — amount=1000 means ¥1000. Do not divide by 100 or subscription revenue will be recorded at 1% of actual value.
Stripe webhook signature verification requires the endpoint secret (STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET). Without it, you cannot distinguish legitimate events from spoofed payloads.
freee OAuth token expires every 24 hours. For webhook-triggered flows, implement token refresh within the handler or recurring payments will fail to journal after 24h.
For subscription revenue recognition, record the journal entry date as the invoice period_start, not the payment date, to comply with Japanese accrual accounting rules.
stripe-moneyforward-refund-sync: Stripe sends the same charge.refunded event type for both full and partial refunds. Always check refund.amount vs original charge.amount to determine the correct reversal amount.
Stripe JP amounts for JPY have NO decimal conversion — amount=1000 means ¥1000. Apply the same logic to refund amounts.
MoneyForward requires a 売上返品 or 返金 account in the chart of accounts. Verify this account exists before creating the reversal entry or the API will return a validation error.
Stripe test keys (sk_test_*) generate test refund events. Ensure your webhook endpoint filters by key environment to avoid posting test refunds to production MoneyForward.
gmo-pg-freee-payment-notify: GMO-PG callbacks use form-encoded POST (not JSON). Your webhook handler must parse application/x-www-form-urlencoded or the payment data will be empty.
Verify GMO-PG callbacks using the shop password hash. Without signature verification, malicious actors can forge payment success notifications.
GMO-PG settlement is batched (not real-time). Record the transaction date as the payment date, not the settlement date, to maintain accurate freee accounting records.
freee OAuth token expires every 24 hours and company_id is required. For webhook-driven flows, implement token refresh within the handler to avoid 401 failures.
linepay-freee-settlement-sync: LINE Pay settlement API requires a Payment API key, not the Channel API key used for messaging. Using the wrong key returns a confusing authentication error.
LINE Pay fees include consumption tax. The freee journal entry must separate the fee base amount and its tax component, or tax reporting will be inaccurate.
freee OAuth token expires every 24 hours and company_id is required on every call. Refresh before processing each settlement batch.
LINE Pay settlements aggregate multiple transactions. Map settlement_id to individual transaction IDs if you need per-transaction reconciliation in freee.
paidy-moneyforward-bnpl-accounting: Paidy webhook requires HMAC-SHA256 signature verification. Store the secret key securely (env var, not in code) and validate every incoming payload.
Paidy settlement timing is typically 2 business days after month-end. Set the receivable due date in MoneyForward to the actual settlement date, not the purchase date.
MoneyForward OAuth token management mirrors freee — token refresh is required. Implement auto-refresh or scheduled BNPL recording will fail on expired tokens.
Paidy captures may be partial. Always use the capture amount from the webhook payload, not the original order amount, for the MoneyForward receivable entry.
freee-slack-expense-approval: freee expense webhooks require Business plan or higher. If on a lower tier, this recipe will not receive trigger events.
freee OAuth token expires every 24 hours. Both the webhook handler (read expense) and approval updater (write status) need valid tokens — refresh proactively.
Slack interactive message payloads must be acknowledged within 3 seconds or the button click will appear to fail. Send an immediate 200 response, then process the approval asynchronously.
Slack interactive messages require a Request URL configured in your Slack app settings. Without it, button clicks are silently dropped.
freee-kintone-invoice-dashboard: freee invoices API returns max 100 records per page. Implement offset-based pagination or the dashboard will only show the first 100 invoices.
freee OAuth token expires every 24 hours and company_id is required. Refresh before each sync run or the scheduled dashboard update will fail.
kintone does not support native upsert. Query existing records by freee invoice_id first, then add or update to avoid duplicate rows in the dashboard app.
kintone field codes are workspace-specific. Map freee invoice fields to kintone field codes in configuration — hard-coding field codes will break across environments.
freee-cloudsign-nda-workflow: CloudSign document status transitions are strict: draft → sent → agreed. You must create as draft first, then explicitly send. Attempting to send a non-draft document will fail.
freee OAuth token expires every 24 hours and the partner API uses company_id scope. Ensure the token belongs to the correct freee company before retrieving partner data.
CloudSign template placeholders must exactly match the field names passed via API. Test with draft mode first to verify placeholder mapping before sending live NDAs.
CloudSign free plan limits to 5 documents per month. For bulk NDA generation, check remaining quota before each send to avoid hard failures mid-batch.
yayoi-box-receipt-archive: Yayoi API (via Misoca) uses separate OAuth credentials from Yayoi desktop software. Ensure you are using cloud version credentials — desktop license keys will not work.
Box folder auto-creation may fail if the parent folder does not exist. Create the year folder first, then the month subfolder, in two sequential API calls.
Receipt images from Yayoi may be large. Box upload has a 50MB file size limit per single upload; use chunked upload API for larger receipt batches.
Japanese e-Tax law (電子帳簿保存法) requires receipt archives to be tamper-proof. Enable Box's content retention policy on the archive folder to prevent accidental deletion.
smaregi-freee-pos-journal: Smaregi API uses a contract-specific subdomain (e.g., api.smaregi.dev/{contract_id}/). Ensure the base URL includes your contract ID or all requests will 404.
freee OAuth token expires every 24 hours and company_id is required. Refresh before the daily journal post or the entire day's POS data will fail to record.
Map Smaregi product categories to freee account items (勘定科目) in advance. Unmapped categories will either fail or land in a catch-all account, making reconciliation difficult.
Smaregi and freee both use JPY integers, but Smaregi may include tax-exclusive amounts while freee expects tax-inclusive. Confirm tax handling alignment before posting.
make-freee-google-sheets-report: freee OAuth token expires every 24 hours. Make (Integromat) must refresh the token before each scheduled scenario run — configure the freee connection with refresh token enabled.
freee reports API may timeout for large datasets (full fiscal year trial balance). Use start_date/end_date filters to narrow the query and avoid 504 errors.
Make scenario execution timeout is 40 minutes. For large financial reports, split data extraction into multiple Make runs to avoid hitting the timeout.
Google Sheets API has a rate limit of 100 requests per 100 seconds. Use batch update (values.batchUpdate) instead of cell-by-cell writes for the report population.
salesforce-freee-deal-invoice: freee requires a trading partner (取引先) to exist before creating an invoice. Use the partner API to search-and-create if the Salesforce account doesn't yet exist in freee.
freee OAuth token expires every 24 hours and company_id is required. Salesforce process builder may trigger at any time — ensure token refresh is automated, not manual.
Salesforce opportunity amounts may be in a non-JPY currency. Convert to JPY integers before passing to freee — freee does not accept decimal amounts or non-JPY currencies.
The custom field 'freee_invoice_id__c' must be pre-created in the Salesforce schema. The API will silently ignore writes to non-existent custom fields.
base-ec-freee-order-accounting: BASE API uses OAuth2 with a 30-day access token and 60-day refresh token. Implement auto-refresh well before expiry — if the refresh token expires, re-authorization requires manual user intervention.
BASE includes shipping fees in the order total. Separate shipping into its own freee account (発送手数料) or shipping revenue will be incorrectly classified as product sales.
freee OAuth token expires every 24 hours and company_id is required. Both BASE and freee tokens must be valid simultaneously for the sync to work.
Japanese consumption tax has two rates (10% standard, 8% reduced for food). BASE order items may mix rates — ensure each freee line item carries the correct tax_rate classification.
